channel.title: Smartypants
channel.description: Latest releases from Smartypants on Dropout.tv

item.title: Puzzles, Siblings, Mysteries
item.description:
Anna evaluates word puzzles. Priscilla rates sibling combos. Chris solves the ultimate mystery.

Duration: 34:00

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, anna garcia, priscilla davies, chris grace

item.title: Stereotypes, Tardiness, Reality TV
item.description:
Peter explores Asian excellence. Mano ends lateness. Izzy celebrates "The Real Housewives."

Duration: 39:58

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, peter kim, mano agapion, izzy roland
